title: MainHealthState
description: Schema for .github/ai-state/main-health.json — the main branch health projection consumed by the launch gate, self-cycle runner, merge scripts, and monitoring. Written by write-main-health-state.ps1 after a post-merge health gate run. See docs/ai-native/main-health-policy.md for state semantics and docs/ai-native/health-state-schema.md for field-level documentation.

markerVersion.description: Schema version. Current is 1. Increment when the schema shape changes.

state.description: Health state of the main branch. green = all checks pass, yellow = non-critical failure, red = critical failure, black = unrecoverable.

commitSha.description: Git SHA of the commit this health state was captured for. 7-40 hex characters.

capturedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this health state was captured.

checks.description: Names of all health checks that were evaluated (e.g. tsc, build, prisma, test:boundary).

failedChecks.description: Subset of checks that failed. Each entry must appear in checks.

allowedWorkerClasses.description: Worker classes permitted to launch in this state. green = [all], yellow = [fix-only, docs], red/black = [].

blockedWorkerClasses.description: Worker classes explicitly blocked in this state. Complement of allowedWorkerClasses for launch gate enforcement.

failureClassifications.description: Structured failure classification for each failed check. Populated by classify-health-failure.js when failures are present.

reason.description: Optional human-readable reason for the state transition (e.g. 'Prisma schema drift detected').

checkName.description: Name of the failed check this classification applies to.

category.description: Failure category determined by the health failure classifier.

matchedPatterns.description: Regex pattern sources that matched the failure text.
